reason: Defines the AgentRun session architecture boundaries and backend command surface responsibilities.
Defines the target AgentRun Mailbox envelope, scheduler, barrier/drain, hook convergence, recovery, and Thread/Turn naming contract.
Documents how user inputs enter launch/session startup paths and how run/frame/runtime state is established.
Defines runtime execution state projection and AgentRun workspace mailbox command surface boundaries.
Defines cross-layer response and projection contracts for frontend/backend command handling.
Guides frontend type modeling for command responses and workspace projections.
Defines AgentRun workspace command authority and mailbox UI state consumption on the frontend.
Defines AgentRun command API ownership and frontend route/service contract boundaries.
Defines current implementation facts and cut-over gates that implementation must satisfy.
